text: Every morning, I wake up at six o'clock and stretch before drinking a glass of water. After a quick shower, I have toast and coffee for breakfast. My work starts at eight; I typically work from home and take a short break at noon for a simple lunch. Exercise is important to me, so I go for a run or do yoga for thirty minutes after work. In the evening, I prepare dinner, read a book, or watch a show to relax. I try to go to bed by ten. Sticking to this routine helps me stay focused and healthy.
